action.reasoning: Observation: GWNet 150 epochs got mae_60min=3.8103, worse than best 3.5596. Model too small (122K params), skip connection pooling loses temporal info. Analysis: Need proper WaveNet architecture with correct skip connections and larger capacity. Decision: Rewrite GWNet properly, train 100 epochs (~17min).
